questions.query_text: In the vitejs/vite releases, which release note refers to the CHANGELOG.md for details and is tagged as v8.0.1?

questions.query_text: Across the vitejs/vite releases, how does the release note of v8.0.1 differ from the release note of v8.0.2?

options.text: Both release notes refer to the CHANGELOG.md for details, but they are for different versions.
v8.0.1 includes a new feature, while v8.0.2 only contains bug fixes.
v8.0.1 is a prerelease, while v8.0.2 is a stable release.
v8.0.1 has a detailed changelog, while v8.0.2 has no changelog.
